headline: Did Someone Say Dividends? Here's How Much Of These Tech Stocks You Need To Yield $100 Per Month
summary: The S&P 500 dropped 19.2% in 2022, its worst performance in any year since it declined 38.4% during the global financial crisis in 2008. The Dow Jones Industrial Average finished 2022 down 8.5% on the year, while the Nasdaq declined 33%.
